channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Florist Learns the Power of Social Media
item.description: On World Social Media Day, ABC News' Danny New highlights a florist's dream of becoming a flower farmer and how social media changed her life.

item.title: Supreme Court blocks Trump's bid to end birthright citizenship
item.description: The Supreme Court on Tuesday rejected President Donald Trump's executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship in the United States.

item.title: WATCH: Countdown to America 250: Alaska
item.description: ABC News' Trevor Ault travels across the Pacific Ocean to Alaska for "50 States in 50 Weeks," ahead of America's 250th birthday.

item.title: How the Supreme Court ruled on Trump's agenda this term
item.description: The court's rulings affirmed Mr. Trump's authority over large parts of the government, while also dealing notable blows to his agenda.
